message:
fix(search): Prevent double-offset in hybrid search mode

When using hybrid search with --offset, the offset was being applied
twice: once inside rrf_fuse() and again in the common pagination code
after the match statement. This caused users to skip 2x the intended
number of results when using hybrid mode (the default).

Fixed by passing 0 as offset to rrf_fuse() and limit+offset as the
limit, allowing the common pagination code to handle offset
consistently across all search modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
